originator.description: The number from which to send the message

createdDatetime.description: The date and time of the creation of the message in RFC3339 format (Y-m-dTH:i:sP)

datacoding.description: Using unicode will limit the maximum number of characters to 70 instead of 160

gateway.description: The SMS route that is used to send the message

groupIds.description: Group IDs separated by commas, If provided recipients can be omitted

mclass.description: Indicated the message type. 1 is a normal message, 0 is a flash message.

reportUrl.description: The status report URL to be used on a per-message basis. Reference is required for a status report webhook to be sent.

scheduledDatetime.description: The scheduled date and time of the message in RFC3339 format (Y-m-dTH:i:sP)

type.description: The type of message. Values can be: sms, binary, or flash.

typeDetails.description: A hash with extra information. Is only used when a binary message is sent.

validity.description: The amount of seconds that the message is valid
